sources.name: C64-Wiki TOP100
sources.notes: Top 100 C64-Wiki scores. The page states that only games with at least 4 votes are included and that it is updated every 24 hours.

sources.name: C64-Wiki TOP1000
sources.notes: Broader C64-Wiki score list. The page is named TOP1000 but currently exposes the ranked rows present in the live page, which may be fewer than 1000.

sources.name: Lemon Amiga Top 100
sources.notes: Top 100 Lemon Amiga vote list with a minimum of 50 votes.

sources.name: Lemon Amiga Top 100 (25+ votes)
sources.notes: Broader Lemon Amiga vote list with a minimum of 25 votes. Lower priority than the 50-vote source when both point to the same game page.
